tweets.text:
Stocks have outperformed houses significantly over the past five decades. While this is a true statement, real estate has created wealth for MORE people due to scale, compounding, and accessibility.  Real estate is a forced long-term investment that allows time to work for you.  Most retail investors make repeated mistakes in the stock market that impair their returns, with the most significant drag to performance being trading frequency.
https://t.co/rek3Z6tIAZ
